data.summary: Reorder summary for Magnolia Home & Garden.

closingText.text: I've drafted a reorder for Magnolia Home & Garden duplicating ORD-90412: 3 line items, 24 units, subtotal $5,640.19 after VIP 8% discount. Delivery May 19, all SKUs in stock. Let me know if you want to modify quantities or compare with the original before confirming.
